title: CBDT Notifies TDS Exemption for Payments to Eligible IFSC Units
content:
# CBDT Notifies TDS Exemption for Payments to Eligible IFSC Units

Ek important update hai! Government ne International Financial Services Centre (IFSC) Units ko hone wale kuch specified payments par Tax Deducted at Source (TDS) se exemption announce kiya hai.

Central Board of Direct Taxes (CBDT) ne Notification No. 80/2026 dated July 10, 2026, issue kiya hai, jisme Income-tax Act, 2025 ke Section 400(1) read with Section 147 ke powers use kiye gaye hain.

Is notification ke key points yahan diye gaye hain:

*   **Exemption Ka Scope:** Ye exemption specified payments par लागू होगा jo eligible IFSC units ko kiye jaate hain, aur isme various categories ke IFSC entities cover kiye gaye hain, jaise Banking Units, Finance Companies, Fund Management Entities, Broker Dealers, aur FinTech Entities, along with others.
*   **Effective Date:** Ye notification retrospectively April 1, 2026, se effective mana jayega.
*   **Condition for Exemption:** Is exemption ka benefit lene ke liye, eligible IFSC unit ko payer ko Form No. 1(N) mein ek statement-cum-declaration furnish karna hoga. Is declaration mein IFSC unit ko twenty consecutive tax years specify karne honge jinke liye woh Section 147 ke under deduction opt kar rahe hain.
*   **Purpose:** Is step ka aim India ke IFSC ecosystem ko strengthen karna aur financial institutions ke liye ease of doing business enhance karna hai.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification here](https://www.incometax.gov.in/iec/foportal/latest-updates/notifications)

*Published on: 12 July 2026*
